description:
Replace the body of each toolchain default.nix with a single call to `toolboxLib.buildToolchain`. Affected packages:
- go-toolchain
- rust-toolchain
- buck2-toolchain
- python-toolchain
- js-toolchain
- solidity-toolchain

Each ~23-line file becomes ~2 lines. Verify with `nix flake check` and build-test at least one toolchain.
title: Migrate all 6 toolchain packages to use buildToolchain
